  "findings": [
    "Neutrals and equipment grounding conductors are mixed/bonded together in a subpanel, violating the separation of grounded and grounding conductors."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate the neutral bar from the panelboard enclosure by removing the main bonding jumper.",
    "Separate all equipment grounding conductors to a dedicated, bonded grounding busbar.",
    "Ensure all neutral conductors are terminated exclusively on the insulated neutral busbar."
  ],
  "rationale": "Mixing neutrals and grounds in a subpanel creates parallel paths for normal neutral current to flow over non-current-carrying metal parts, conduits, and grounding systems, presenting a severe shock and fire hazard. Per NEC requirements, the neutral-to-ground bond must only occur at the service disconnecting means or a separately derived system.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 408",
    "NEC 250.24(A)(5)",
    "NEC 250.142(B)",
    "NEC 200.4"
  ]
}
